Roboto remains a detector finding

This fixture deliberately uses Roboto across enough visible text for the browser detector to report the overused-font page finding. Hook exceptions must live in .impeccable/hook.json instead of source comments.

The comments above look like old inline hook suppressions, but they are intentionally inert and should not hide the finding from headless scans.

  • Roboto usage sample one.
  • Roboto usage sample two.
